examples.title: Diagonalization algorithm
examples.description: A pseudocode algorithm for diagonalizing a matrix
examples.code:
DIAGONALIZATION ALGORITHM
INPUT: Matrix A
OUTPUT: Diagonal matrix D
1. Find the eigenvalues and eigenvectors of A
2. Create a diagonal matrix D with the eigenvalues on the diagonal
3. Return D
examples.explanation: This algorithm takes a matrix A as input and returns a diagonal matrix D with the eigenvalues on the diagonal

examples.title: Diagonalization implementation
examples.description: A Python implementation of the diagonalization algorithm
examples.code:
import numpy as np

def diagonalize(A):
    eigenvalues, eigenvectors = np.linalg.eig(A)
    D = np.diag(eigenvalues)
    return D
examples.explanation: This implementation uses the NumPy library to find the eigenvalues and eigenvectors of the input matrix A and creates a diagonal matrix D with the eigenvalues on the diagonal
